titlestmt.author: Compiled by S. Lee, J. Parker, E. Engst

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-11-09 18:12:24 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, publications, records, financial statements, bulletins.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, files concerning Statler's new wing; construction and engineering publications; other records of Cornell's Statler Inn; financial statements; photograph; and Statler Inn registration cards for Harry Truman, Barry Goldwater, and Robert Kennedy.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: Compiled by:
defitem.item: S. Lee, J. Parker, E. Engst

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence of Professor Charles I. Sayles; files concerning Statler's new wing, 1952-1959; correspondence regarding equipment; construction and engineering publications; and other records of Cornell's Statler Inn. Also, financial statements from the Statler Inn and Alice Statler Auditorium; photograph of Statler Hotel and Inn employees, Christmas, 1986; and "Statler Hotel and Conference Center Operating Criteria," 1987-1988.
Also Statler Inn registration cards for Harry Truman, April 20, 1960; Barry Goldwater, January 26-27, 1961; and Robert Kennedy, September 28-29, 1964.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University School of Hotel Administration, Statler Inn records, 1928-1988, #28-3-1801. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Statler Hotel on the Cornell campus was formerly known as the Statler Inn.

controlaccess.subject: Hotels, taverns, etc. -- Furniture and equipment.
Hotel management schools.

did.unittitle: Carrier (insurance and air conditioning plus repairs to air conditioning)
Purchasing Equipment List for Food Laboratories, 213, 219, and 216 Storage
Auditorium and addition, Statler's will, etc.
Notebook, Holabird and Root and Borgee
Willard Straight Hall and Clara Dixon - dishwasher and sanitizer
Alco Valve Co. Refrigerant Control Valves
Memos about Sale of Beer in Willard Straight Hall
Main Dining Room Department Training Manual - Statler Inn
Dedication of the Statler Addition - Photos
Renderings of Statler Hotel and Conference Center
Renderings - Development and Alumni Affairs Offices
